purpose: Run the complete content runtime dry-run chain from BLXST text to guarded controlled apply context and disabled executor, without mutating production resources.

final_statuses_non_exhaustive.content_runtime_e2e_guarded_for_later_co: Ready content path reached controlled context and disabled executor refused real apply as expected.
final_statuses_non_exhaustive.content_runtime_e2e_safe_stop_before_app: Content path safely stopped before apply context.
final_statuses_non_exhaustive.content_runtime_e2e_blocked: A dry-run step failed or safety flag failed.

hard_rules: It must not write D1, R2, KV, Workers, website source, registry, Cloudflare, git, or deployment state.
A ready E2E result means future controlled apply path is guarded, not that real apply is allowed now.
Unknown or blocked content paths must safe-stop.
Production mutation and production deploy remain disabled.
